name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand, analyse and draw logical conclusions from numerical data. Suitable for roles requiring data analysis and numerical reasoning.

name: Verify - Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate the logic of various kinds of arguments. Assesses verbal comprehension and critical thinking.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and rules in abstract information. Tests logical thinking and problem-solving ability independent of verbal or numerical content.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions from statements or premises. Assesses structured, rule-based thinking for analytical roles.

name: Verify G+ Cognitive Ability
description: A short, adaptive measure of general cognitive ability combining numerical, verbal and inductive reasoning. Provides a broad measure of g-factor intelligence.

name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire measures 32 dimensions of personality relevant to the workplace. Predicts job performance, leadership, teamwork and customer service behaviour.

name: Motivational Questionnaire
description: Measures 18 dimensions of motivation related to the work environment. Identifies what energises and drives an individual at work, supporting engagement and retention.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Data Analysis
description: Interactive simulation assessing the ability to work with and interpret data using realistic workplace tools. Measures data literacy in a job-relevant context.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Numerical
description: Interactive work simulation measuring numerical reasoning in a realistic job context. Candidates analyse graphs, tables and reports to answer business questions.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Java 8 programming language including OOP principles, collections, streams, lambda expressions and concurrency.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses proficiency in Python programming including syntax, data structures, OOP, libraries and scripting. Suitable for data science and software engineering roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests knowledge of JavaScript programming including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming, frameworks and web development concepts.

name: SQL (New)
description: Measures SQL proficiency including queries, joins, aggregations, subqueries and database management. Suitable for data analyst and database roles.

name: C# (New)
description: Tests C# programming knowledge including .NET framework, OOP, LINQ, async/await, and enterprise application patterns.

name: C++ (New)
description: Assesses C++ programming skills including memory management, OOP, templates, STL and systems programming concepts.

name: Automata Fix (Coding Simulation)
description: Coding simulation where candidates debug and fix existing code. Tests practical programming ability in a realistic development context across multiple languages.

name: SHL Coding Pro
description: Advanced coding assessment requiring candidates to write solutions to programming challenges. Measures algorithmic thinking and code quality.

name: SHL Numerical Reasoning (Verify Interactive)
description: Combines numerical reasoning with interactive workplace scenarios, assessing how candidates use numerical data in realistic business contexts.

name: Customer Contact - Telephony Simulation
description: Simulates telephone customer service scenarios. Candidates handle inbound calls and resolve customer queries. Measures customer focus, communication and problem resolution skills.

name: Contact Centre - Service Simulation
description: Realistic contact centre simulation covering customer interactions across multiple channels. Assesses service orientation, multitasking, accuracy and empathy.

name: Retail - Sales Associate Simulation
description: Simulates retail sales associate scenarios including customer interaction, product knowledge queries and sales techniques. Assesses sales orientation and customer focus.

name: Bank Administrator Simulation
description: Simulates banking administrative tasks including data entry, processing transactions and responding to customer queries. Assesses accuracy, attention to detail and customer orientation.

name: Financial Analyst Simulation
description: Work simulation for financial analyst roles covering financial modelling, report analysis and investment decision making. Assesses analytical thinking in a finance context.

name: SHL Situational Judgment Test
description: Presents realistic work scenarios and asks candidates to evaluate the effectiveness of different responses. Measures judgment, decision making and work-relevant behaviour.

name: Sales Manager Situational Judgment
description: Situational judgment test designed for sales manager candidates. Scenarios cover team management, pipeline management, client escalation and sales strategy decisions.

name: Graduate Situational Judgment Test
description: Assesses graduate-level judgment using realistic early career workplace scenarios. Measures decision making, integrity and professional behaviour for graduate hires.

name: Universal Competency Report
description: Generates competency-based reports from OPQ32 results mapping personality to 8 universal competency areas. Used for selection and development.

name: Leadership Report
description: Provides detailed insight into leadership style, potential derailers and development areas based on OPQ32 personality data. Used for senior leader selection and development.

name: Sales Report
description: Personality-based report assessing sales competencies including prospecting, closing, customer focus and resilience. Derived from OPQ32 for sales role selection.

name: Customer Service Report
description: Personality-based report predicting customer service performance including empathy, patience, helpfulness and conflict management. Derived from OPQ32.

name: ADEPT-15
description: A personality questionnaire measuring 15 key workplace traits including thinking styles, interpersonal styles and coping styles. Fast to complete and highly predictive.

name: SHL Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ)
description: Comprehensive occupational personality assessment measuring how personality affects performance across roles. The gold standard for personality in the workplace.

name: Workplace English Test
description: Measures English language proficiency in a workplace context including reading, writing, grammar and comprehension. Suitable for roles requiring strong English communication.

name: Numerical Comprehension
description: Assesses ability to understand basic numerical information. Suitable for entry-level roles requiring everyday numerical competence.

name: Verbal Comprehension
description: Measures ability to understand and process written information at a basic level. Suitable for entry-level and frontline roles.

name: Checking
description: Tests speed and accuracy in checking and comparing information. Assesses attention to detail, perceptual speed and accuracy for administrative and clerical roles.

name: Calculation
description: Measures speed and accuracy in performing arithmetic calculations. Suitable for roles involving financial processing, payroll and accounting.

name: Mechanical Comprehension
description: Assesses understanding of physical and mechanical principles. Suitable for engineering, technical and manufacturing roles.

name: Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures ability to visualise and manipulate two- and three-dimensional shapes. Suitable for design, architecture, engineering and technical roles.

name: Reading Comprehension Test
description: Assesses reading comprehension and ability to extract key information from text-based materials relevant to the workplace.

name: Technology Professonal - Software Engineering Fundamentals
description: Tests foundational knowledge of software engineering including data structures, algorithms, system design, databases and software development lifecycle.

name: Microsoft Excel 2016 (Advanced)
description: Tests advanced Excel skills including pivot tables, VLOOKUP, complex formulas, macros and data analysis features.

name: Microsoft Excel 2016 (Intermediate)
description: Tests intermediate Excel skills including formulas, charts, sorting, filtering and basic data management.

name: Accounting Principles
description: Assesses knowledge of accounting fundamentals including financial statements, double-entry bookkeeping, balance sheets and income statements.

name: Financial Accounting
description: Tests knowledge of financial accounting including IFRS, financial statement preparation, consolidation and reporting requirements.

name: Project Management Fundamentals
description: Tests knowledge of project management principles including project planning, risk management, stakeholder communication and Agile methodologies.

name: SHL Workplace Safety
description: Assesses awareness and knowledge of workplace health and safety procedures including hazard identification, risk assessment and safety regulations.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Workplace Simulation
description: Comprehensive workplace simulation assessing multiple cognitive and behavioural competencies in a realistic office environment. Covers communication, problem solving and task management.

name: SHL Numerical Reasoning (Graduate)
description: Graduate-level numerical reasoning test measuring ability to interpret statistical tables, graphs and numerical data at a graduate standard.

name: SHL Verbal Reasoning (Graduate)
description: Graduate-level verbal reasoning test assessing ability to analyse and evaluate complex written arguments at a graduate standard.

name: General Ability - Short Form
description: A short measure of general cognitive ability covering verbal, numerical and abstract reasoning. Suitable for high-volume assessment of entry-level and frontline roles.

name: Hogan Personality Inventory (HPI)
description: Measures normal personality characteristics and their relationship to job performance. Assesses seven primary scales including adjustment, ambition, sociability and prudence.

name: Hogan Development Survey (HDS)
description: Identifies personality-based derailers that emerge under stress and can disrupt leadership effectiveness. Measures 11 dysfunctional personality tendencies.

name: Hogan Motives Values and Preferences Inventory (MVPI)
description: Assesses core values, motives and preferences that drive career choices and determine cultural fit. Measures 10 value scales including power, affiliation and recognition.

name: SHL Scenarios (Situational Judgement)
description: Presents candidates with video-based workplace scenarios and asks them to choose the most and least effective response. Highly engaging and realistic assessment experience.

name: Leadership Situational Judgment Test
description: Assesses leadership judgment through realistic management scenarios including team performance issues, stakeholder management and strategic decisions.

name: Workplace Behaviour Assessment
description: A brief behavioural questionnaire assessing cultural fit and work style for frontline and volume hiring. Measures integrity, dependability, teamwork and customer focus.

name: SHL Integrity Assessment
description: Assesses counterproductive work behaviours and integrity-related attitudes. Identifies risk of theft, absenteeism, substance abuse and other honesty-related concerns.

name: Data Science Fundamentals
description: Assesses knowledge of data science concepts including statistics, machine learning fundamentals, data wrangling, model evaluation and Python/R usage.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Tests knowledge of machine learning concepts including supervised and unsupervised learning, model selection, regularisation, neural networks and evaluation metrics.

name: SHL Verify - Calculation and Checking
description: Combines calculation speed and checking accuracy in a single test. Suitable for roles requiring numerical accuracy and fast information processing.

name: Business Analyst Simulation
description: Realistic simulation for business analyst roles. Candidates analyse business requirements, interpret data and recommend solutions in a realistic workplace environment.

name: SHL Digital Interviewing
description: Video-based interview solution where candidates record responses to structured questions. Uses AI analysis to evaluate communication, presence and competency indicators.

name: SHL Smart Interview
description: Structured virtual interview platform with AI-powered candidate evaluation. Provides consistent structured interviews at scale with automated scoring and insights.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Fundamentals
description: Tests knowledge of AWS cloud services including compute, storage, networking, security and deployment. Suitable for cloud engineer and DevOps roles.

name: DevOps Fundamentals
description: Assesses knowledge of DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, containerisation, infrastructure as code, monitoring and deployment strategies.

name: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Tests knowledge of cybersecurity concepts including network security, threat analysis, encryption, risk management and compliance frameworks.

name: SHL Corporate Social Responsibility Assessment
description: Assesses alignment with corporate values including ethical behaviour, environmental responsibility, diversity inclusion and social impact orientation.

name: Graduate Battery - Numerical and Verbal
description: Combined graduate-level battery including both numerical and verbal reasoning tests. Efficiently assesses cognitive ability for graduate schemes with two tests in one session.

name: SHL Adaptive General Ability Test
description: Adaptive test measuring general cognitive ability that adjusts question difficulty based on candidate responses. Provides precise ability estimates in a shorter test time.

name: Healthcare - Clinical Judgment
description: Situational judgment test designed for healthcare professionals. Scenarios cover patient care, clinical decision making, team communication and ethical dilemmas.

name: Legal Reasoning Test
description: Assesses ability to analyse legal texts, identify key principles and apply reasoning to legal scenarios. Suitable for law graduate and legal professional recruitment.
